title: Mediterranean Archaeology
subtitle: Designed and developed a Django based full stack application to extract, pre-process and display data. Used modern technologies like Python’s Django, Docker, Postgres, and PDF Miner to take an idea to wireframes, to design and to a fully developed web application.

title: M1 Automater
subtitle: Developed a Laravel (REST API) - Vue Js (Single Page) application to automate the M1 process. Learnt and implemented advanced concepts like Dependency Injection, Routing and Authentication.
